title: OpenAPI Security Scheme Object
description: Defines a security scheme that can be used by the operations.

type.description: The type of the security scheme.

description.description: A description for the security scheme.

name.description: The name of the header, query, or cookie parameter to be used (required for apiKey).

in.description: The location of the API key (required for apiKey).

scheme.description: The name of the HTTP Authorization scheme (required for http).

bearerFormat.description: A hint to the client to identify how the bearer token is formatted.

openIdConnectUrl.description: OpenId Connect URL to discover OAuth2 configuration values (required for openIdConnect).
